NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: QUENTIN KOPP, REPORTER: SCOTT HUGHES, CSR # 12365 301/QK * * * ATTY. SCOTT ASK THE COURT WHETHER GENERAL MOTORS' MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT WILL HE HEARD TODAY PER EX PARTE ORDER FILED ON MAY 15, 2009. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION BUT LATER IN CHAMBERS REVOKE THE EARLIER RULING BECAUSE NO MOTION WAS FILED OR ENTERED IN THE REGISTER OF ACTIONS. * * *
